data.title: Walgreens going private in $23.7 billion acquisition deal
data.description: The deal also includes a "go-shop" period in which Walgreens has 35 days to evaluate and enter into negotiations with parties offering alternative proposals.

data.title: GrubMarket rolls out AI solution to navigate supply chain language
data.description: The dictionary assistance feature marks GrubMarkets latest use of AI in its operations for wholesalers and distributors.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: The top 3 online retailers in Health & Beauty
data.description: Online sales have been good to Walgreens atop the Health & Beauty category in online retail, despite struggles with its retail pharmacy chain.

data.title: HSBC hooks up with TreviPay to expand B2B payments
data.description: The initiative is intended to support businesses navigating the evolving ecommerce market by integrating trade credit options into online sales portals.

data.title: Ferguson merges brands under a single name
data.description: Ferguson Home will integrate Build.com’s ecommerce platform with Ferguson’s showroom network, which includes more than 250 locations and 1,200 product experts.
